records.ety: [L. constipatus, p. p. of constipare; con- + stipare to crowd together. See Costive.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Constipated; p. pr. & vb. n. Constipating.]

defs: To crowd or cram into a narrow compass; to press together or condense.
quotes: Of cold the property is to condense and constipate.

defs: To stop (a channel) by filling it, and preventing passage through it; as, to constipate the capillary vessels.
To render costive; to cause constipation in.
